name: AJ
text: Adam set himself apart from the rest: with excellent communication, organization, and overall professionalism!  His craftsmanship is undeniable - however it’s his patience, teamwork, and grace under pressure that I really appreciated.  Adam will work with you to turn your dreams  into a reality!

name: Billy and Amanda
text: We couldn't be happier with the fence Adam built for our home. He installed a beautiful 48-inch-tall horizontal farm-style perimeter fence with black pillars that perfectly complement our house. The craftsmanship and attention to detail are evident throughout the entire project, and the stain finish really brought everything together. Adam was reliable, easy to work with, communicated well throughout the project, and took pride in delivering quality work. The finished product exceeded our expectations and has completely transformed the look of our property. If you're looking for someone who does quality work, shows up when he says he will, and genuinely cares about the final result, I would recommend Adam without hesitation.

name: Chrissy
text: Adam designed and built a beautiful, sturdy carport gate for our home at a great price. His workmanship was excellent, and the whole process was smooth from start to finish. He was dependable, on time, and honest. We’re so happy with the finished product and will definitely hire Adam again. Highly recommend!

name: Oliver
text: I’ve used Adam and his team for several projects now. They show up on time, and get the job done quickly and as promised!

name: Janet Graves
text: I am very happy with my new gates and backyard fence. I love the beautiful horizontal boards and it was a pleasure working with Adam. He was communicative and responsive to our needs and requests. Thank you, Adam.

name: Tara Coyote
text: Adam created a lovely deck for me recently. Everything about his work is top notch quality, plus he was easy to work with, showed up on time, followed through with what he said he would do and was positive to be around. The deck he created is like a piece of art on my property that is a solid, well built and functional. He’s a great guy, with a conscious price point and I definitely would hire him again for future jobs. Highly recommended!

name: Ken
text: Adam did an outstanding job installing my 300-foot cedar fence with two gates. The project was completed on schedule, at a reasonable cost, and the quality of the work was excellent. He was always responsive to my questions and handled change requests quickly and professionally. I highly recommend Adam to anyone looking for a reliable fence contractor.

name: Lauretta
text:
I cannot say enough good things about the work Adam and Scott did on my gate and fence. I had been trying for about a year and a half to find someone who could help me with my solar rolling driveway gate, and they were finally the ones who made it happen.

Adam and Scott rebuilt my gate, put everything together, and did an absolutely beautiful job. This was not a simple project. It involved a white vinyl fence and gate that had to be fabricated, and we were able to find a company in Honolulu to do that part. Adam helped bring everything together and made sure the job was done right.

I also really appreciated that Adam was honest and fair with his pricing. That means a lot, especially when you are trying to get a project completed and need someone you can trust.

My driveway gate looks great and works beautifully. I am very grateful for their help and would highly recommend Adam and Scott to anyone looking for reliable, quality gate and fence work.
